ai_ambition: Automate as much customer-facing AI as possible — support, product content, personalisation. We need to show AI impact fast to satisfy our investors.
pain_points: Support team of 4 is overwhelmed — 300+ tickets per day with 18-hour average response time
Product descriptions for new SKUs take 2 hours per item — we launch 50 new products per month
Personalisation is manual — same emails go to all 80k customers regardless of behaviour
competitors_doing: Direct competitors are using AI chatbots for support and have cut response times to under 2 hours
